title: STAR WARS™: The Clone Wars - Republic Heroes™

notes: Doesn't start at all, always just crashes without an error message
title: STAR WARS™: The Clone Wars - Republic Heroes™

notes: I got it working! You have to download https://community.pcgamingwiki.com/files/file/576-bulletstorm-xlivedll/?do=download&r=2459&confirm=1&t=1&csrfKey=b17731f25b5b6663e8a6ab8e1e1ce14b, extract the xlive.dll (Bulletstorm).zip and copy the xlive.dll and xlive.ini to ~/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/32420/pfx/drive_c/windows/system32/ and ~/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/32420/pfx/drive_c/windows/syswow64/. You have to rename the Republic Heroes.exe file in ~/.steam/steam/steamapps/common/Star\ Wars\ The\ Clone\ Wars/ to RepublicHeroesLauncher.exe.
title: STAR WARS™: The Clone Wars - Republic Heroes™
